name: sql_instructions_cornerstone_timeseries
description: SQL execution agent examples for Cornerstone (CSOD) training time series validation and trend queries.

items.question: Show training risk trend for a person and obligation over the last 90 days (SOC2 + HIPAA).
items.instructions: Return daily trend of SOC2 and HIPAA risk for the same person/obligation for charting and QA.
items.sql:
SELECT s.snapshot_ts::date AS day,
       s.soc2_raw_risk, s.training_risk_level AS soc2_risk_level,
       h.hipaa_raw_risk, h.training_risk_level AS hipaa_risk_level
FROM public.soc2_training_risk_timeseries s
LEFT JOIN public.hipaa_training_risk_timeseries h
  ON h.person_key = s.person_key AND h.obligation_code = s.obligation_code AND h.snapshot_ts::date = s.snapshot_ts::date
WHERE s.person_key = :person_key AND s.obligation_code = :obligation_code
  AND s.snapshot_ts >= (NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days')
ORDER BY day;

items.question: How many trainings became past due today (by obligation)?
items.instructions: Provide an operational view for alert thresholds; keep as time series slice.
items.sql:
SELECT snapshot_ts::date AS day, obligation_code, COUNT(*) AS past_due_people
FROM public.general_training_risk_timeseries
WHERE snapshot_ts::date = CURRENT_DATE
  AND training_risk_driver_primary = 'past_due'
GROUP BY 1,2
ORDER BY past_due_people DESC;
items.context: Operational monitoring of past-due training events.
